products.title: hairora LED Laser Hair Growth Cap
products.description:
Advanced Low Level Laser Therapy (LLLT) cap with 272 medical-grade laser diodes. Clinically proven to stimulate hair follicles, reduce hair loss, and promote regrowth. FDA-cleared technology. Use just 6 minutes daily for visible results in 16 weeks.

✓ 272 laser diodes for full scalp coverage
✓ Hands-free, comfortable fit
✓ Rechargeable — no cables during use
✓ Works for all hair types

images.altText: hairora LED Laser Hair Growth Cap — 272 laser diodes

products.title: Morr F 5% — Minoxidil & Finasteride Solution
products.description:
Morr F 5% combines Minoxidil (5%) with Finasteride in a lipid-based topical solution for maximum hair regrowth effectiveness. The lipid carrier enhances scalp penetration while minimising systemic absorption.

✓ 5% Minoxidil + Finasteride dual-action
✓ Lipid solution for superior absorption
✓ 60 ml per bottle — approx. 1 month supply
✓ For topical application only

images.altText: Morr F 5% Minoxidil & Finasteride Lipid Solution 60ml by INTAS
